mapper.select: -- 결제 상태 순번 테이블 ( 서명이 된 상태만 ) WITH SIGNSTATUS AS (SELECT TAI.PARAM, TAI.TARGET_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TARGET_ID ORDER BY CASE PARAM -- 승인 WHEN 'approver' THEN 1 -- 검토 WHEN 'reviewer' THEN 2 -- 작성 WHEN 'writer' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ) AS RN FROM ESG.TB_APPROVAL_INFO TAI WHERE TAI.TARGET_TYPE = 'RAP' AND TAI.SIGNATURE IS NOT NULL), -- 감소대책 등룍율 / 개선 이행률 IMPLEMENTATION AS (SELECT E.DOC_NO, E.WRITE_YEAR, COUNT(DISTINCT F.DOC_SEQ) AS REDUCTIONCOUNT, COUNT(F.DOC_SEQ) AS REDUCTIONALLCOUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION D WHERE D.USE_YN = 'Y' AND D.DOC_NO = E.DOC_NO AND D.WRITE_YEAR = E.WRITE_YEAR) AS IMPLCOUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN E.COMPLETED_DATE IS NOT NULL AND E.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN E.DOC_SEQ END) AS REDUCTIONCOMPLETEDCOUNT FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION_REDUCTION E INNER JOIN ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_IMPLEMENTATION F ON E.WRITE_YEAR = F.WRITE_YEAR AND E.DOC_TYPE = F.DOC_TYPE AND E.DOC_NO = F.DOC_NO AND E.DOC_SEQ = F.DOC_SEQ AND E.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY E.DOC_NO, E.WRITE_YEAR) SELECT TP.WRITE_YEAR, TP.DOC_TYPE, TP.DOC_NO, TP.ORGN_ID, TP.COMP_ID, TP.PLAN_NM, TP.START_DATE, TP.END_DATE, TP.ASSESSMENT_DATE, TP.ASSESSMENT_COMPL_DATE, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_CHART_ID, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_GUBUN, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_STANDARDS, TP."desc", TP.USE_YN, TP.CREATED_AT, TP.CREATED_BY, TP.UPDATED_AT, TP.UPDATED_BY, TI.ORGN_NM, SS.PARAM AS SIGN_STATUS, -- 감소대책 등록 요인 수 COALESCE(IM.REDUCTIONCOUNT, 0) AS REDUCTIONCOUNT, -- 유해요인건수 COALESCE(IM.IMPLCOUNT, 0) AS IMPLCOUNT, -- 감소대책등록율(%) (감소대책 등록 요인수 * 100 / 유해요인 건수) COALESCE( CASE WHEN IM.IMPLCOUNT = 0 OR IM.IMPLCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC((IM.REDUCTIONCOUNT * 100.0) / IM.IMPLCOUNT) END, 0) AS IMPLPERCENTAGE, -- 개선조치 건수 COALESCE(IM.REDUCTIONCOMPLETEDCOUNT, 0) AS REDUCTIONCOMPLETEDCOUNT, -- 감소대책 건수 COALESCE(IM.REDUCTIONALLCOUNT, 0) AS REDUCTIONALLCOUNT, -- 개선 이행율(%) (개선조치건수 * 100 / 감소대책 건수) COALESCE( CASE WHEN IM.REDUCTIONALLCOUNT = 0 OR IM.REDUCTIONALLCOUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC((IM.REDUCTIONCOMPLETEDCOUNT * 100) / IM.REDUCTIONALLCOUNT) END, 0) AS REDUCTIONPERCENTAGE FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN TP INNER JOIN ESG.TB_ORGN_INFO TI ON TI.ORGN_ID = TP.ORGN_ID -- 결제 상태 순번 테이블 에서 서명된것 중에 최고순위 하나 가져오기 LEFT JOIN SIGNSTATUS SS ON SS.TARGET_ID = CONCAT(TP.WRITE_YEAR, TP.DOC_NO) AND SS.RN = 1 -- 감소대책 등룍율 / 개선 이행률 LEFT JOIN IMPLEMENTATION IM ON IM.write_year = TP.write_year AND IM.doc_no = TP.doc_no WHERE TP.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND SUBSTR(TP.WRITE_YEAR, 0, 5) = #{searchText} ORDER BY TP.USE_YN DESC, TP.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT TCPEM.ORGN_ID, TOI.ORGN_NM FROM ESG.TB_CLASSIFICATION_PROCESS_EQUIP_MSDS TCPEM LEFT JOIN ESG.TB_ORGN_INFO TOI ON TOI.ORGN_ID = TCPEM.ORGN_ID WHERE TCPEM.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND TCPEM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TCPEM.CONFIRM_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TCPEM.DOC_NO::INTEGER ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(DOC_NO::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS DOC_NO FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN WHERE WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN ( WRITE_YEAR, DOC_TYPE, DOC_NO, ORGN_ID, COMP_ID, PLAN_NM, START_DATE, END_DATE, ASSESSMENT_DATE, ASSESSMENT_COMPL_DATE, RISK_ASSESSMENT_CHART_ID, RISK_ASSESSMENT_GUBUN, RISK_ASSESSMENT_STANDARDS, "desc", CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, RISK_ALLOWANCE_STANDARDS ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'RAP', #{docNo}, #{orgnId}, #{compId}, #{planNm}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{assessmentDate}, #{assessmentComplDate}, #{riskAssessmentChartId}, #{riskAssessmentGubun}, #{riskAssessmentStandards}, #{desc}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{riskAllowanceStandards} )
mapper.select: SELECT TP.WRITE_YEAR, TP.DOC_TYPE, TP.DOC_NO, TP.ORGN_ID, TP.COMP_ID, TP.PLAN_NM, TP.CPEM_WRITE_YEAR, TP.CPEM_DOC_NO, START_DATE, END_DATE, ASSESSMENT_DATE, ASSESSMENT_COMPL_DATE, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_CHART_ID, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_GUBUN, TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_STANDARDS, TP.RISK_ALLOWANCE_STANDARDS, TP."desc", TP.USE_YN, TP.CREATED_AT, TP.CREATED_BY, TP.UPDATED_AT, TP.UPDATED_BY, TI.ORGN_NM, TC.CHART_NM, TC.CHART_DATA, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('RAP', CONCAT(TP.WRITE_YEAR, TP.DOC_NO)) as WRITER_SIGN_YN FROM ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN TP INNER JOIN ESG.TB_ORGN_INFO TI ON TI.ORGN_ID = TP.ORGN_ID INNER JOIN ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_ORGAN_CHART TC ON TC.CHART_ID = TP.RISK_ASSESSMENT_CHART_ID WHERE TP.WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND TP.DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND TP.DOC_NO = #{docNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ESG.TB_RISK_ASSESSMENT_PLAN SET PLAN_NM = #{planNm}, ORGN_ID = #{orgnId}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, ASSESSMENT_DATE = #{assessmentDate}, ASSESSMENT_COMPL_DATE = #{assessmentComplDate}, RISK_ASSESSMENT_CHART_ID = #{riskAssessmentChartId}, RISK_ASSESSMENT_GUBUN = #{riskAssessmentGubun}, RISK_ASSESSMENT_STANDARDS = #{riskAssessmentStandards}, RISK_ALLOWANCE_STANDARDS = #{riskAllowanceStandards}, "desc" = #{desc}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy} WHERE WRITE_YEAR = #{writeYear} AND DOC_TYPE = #{docType} AND DOC_NO = #{docNo}
mapper.select: SELECT a.doc_no, -- 감소대책 등록 요인 수 e.reductionCount, -- 유해요인건수 f.implCount, -- 감소대책등록율(%) (감소대책 등록 요인수 * 100 / 유해요인 건수) CASE WHEN e.reductionCount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC((e.reductionCount * 100.0) / f.implCount) END AS implPercentage, -- 개선조치 건수 g.reductionCompletedCount, -- 감소대책 건수 h.reductionAllCount, -- 개선 이행율(%) (개선조치건수 * 100 / 감소대책 건수) CASE WHEN g.reductionCompletedCount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC((g.reductionCompletedCount * 100) / h.reductionAllCount) END AS reductionPercentage, -- 개선전 평균 위험도 (소수점 반내림) -- 빈도강도법 : 중대성(impact_score) * 가능성(frequency_score) = 위험성결정(risk_score) -> risk_score * 개수 -- 상중하기법 : 위험성결정(risk_score) -> risk_score * 개수 ( SELECT FLOOR( SUM( COALESCE( CASE SPLIT_PART(d.risk_score, '_', 2) WHEN 'l' THEN 1 WHEN 'm' THEN 2 WHEN 'h' THEN 3 ELSE CAST(SPLIT_PART(d.risk_score, '_', 2) AS INTEGER) END, 0 ) ) / COUNT(*) ) FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation d WHERE d.doc_no = #{docNo} AND d.write_year = #{writeYear} AND d.use_yn = 'Y' ) AS implAvgRisk, -- 개선후 평균 위험도 (소수점 반내림) -- 빈도강도법 : 중대성(after_impact_score) * 가능성(after_frequency_score) = 위험성결정(after_risk_score) -> after_risk_score * 개수 -- 상중하기법 : 위험성결정(after_risk_score) -> after_risk_score * 개수 ( SELECT FLOOR( SUM( COALESCE( CASE SPLIT_PART(e.after_risk_score, '_', 2) WHEN 'l' THEN 1 WHEN 'm' THEN 2 WHEN 'h' THEN 3 ELSE CAST(SPLIT_PART(e.after_risk_score, '_', 2) AS INTEGER) END, 0 ) ) / COUNT(*) ) FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation e WHERE e.doc_no = #{docNo} AND e.write_year = #{writeYear} AND e.use_yn = 'Y' ) as reduAvgRisk, tdcd.major_cd, tdcd.minor_cd, tdcd.minor_nm FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds b ON b.comp_id = a.comp_id AND b.orgn_id = a.orgn_id AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.confirm_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tdcd ON 1=1 AND tdcd.major_cd = 'C0040' AND tdcd.minor_cd like CONCAT(#{searchText}, '%') -- 감소대책 등록 요인 수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(e.doc_seq) AS reductionCount FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction e INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation f ON e.write_year = f.write_year AND e.doc_type = f.doc_type AND e.doc_no = f.doc_no AND e.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND e.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE f.doc_no = #{docNo} AND f.write_year = #{writeYear}) e ON 1=1 -- 유해요인건수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS implCount FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation d WHERE d.doc_no = #{docNo} AND d.write_year = #{writeYear} AND d.use_yn = 'Y' ) f ON 1=1 -- 개선조치 건수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(e.doc_seq) as reductionCompletedCount FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction e INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation f ON e.write_year = f.write_year AND e.doc_type = f.doc_type AND e.doc_no = f.doc_no AND e.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND e.use_yn = 'Y' AND e.completed_date is not null WHERE f.doc_no = #{docNo} AND f.write_year = #{writeYear}) g ON 1=1 -- 감소대책 건수 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(e.doc_seq) as reductionAllCount FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction e INNER JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation f ON e.write_year = f.write_year AND e.doc_type = f.doc_type AND e.doc_no = f.doc_no AND e.doc_seq = f.doc_seq AND e.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE f.doc_no = #{docNo} AND f.write_year = #{writeYear}) h ON 1=1 WHERE a.doc_no = #{docNo} AND a.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY tdcd.ord_seq ASC
